cultural_notes.free_notes: Highest-engagement post in set (2334 likes). Sally (سالي) is arguably the most beloved Spacetoon character in Saudi — Japanese anime Mahou no Tenshi Creamy Mami equivalent. Competition mechanic + beloved character = maximum virality.
